title: Skye PVP Modpack
description: This is a sequel to SuperYosh's PVP Modpack. It improves the overall performance and experience of PVP.
body: IMPORTANT: IT IS HIGHY RECCOMENDED THAT YOU INSTALL OPTIFINE ALONG WITH THIS MODPACK. IGNORING THIS MESSAGE WILL LIKELY RESULT IN POOR PREFORMANCE AND AN OVERALL POOR EXPERIENCE. THIS MODPACK HAS ONLY BEEN TESTED WITH OPTIFINE INSTALLED. OPTIFINE DOES NOT COME INCLUDED WITH THIS MODPACK. OptiFine Download Link: [https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar&x=b7c6](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar&x=b7c6) Welcome to Skye! Skye is a modpack designed to help improve the PVP experiance and add useful utilities to Minecraft. Skye is designed to be a cleaner version of [SuperYosh's PVP Client](https://modrinth.com/modpack/yoshpvpclient). It features less clutter, improved performance, and more features compared to the old modpack. Features that have been added: Transparent GUI Custom HUD Elements Improved Performance Social Features + Cosmetics (Essential Mod)
